pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source version from 1.8 to 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with Java 11 features if source level remains at 1.8 while targeting 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler target version from 1.8 to 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Generated bytecode will be incompatible with Java 11 runtime if target level remains at 1.8.
